special_service.table_booking_desc:
Enjoy a luxurious dining experience that combines authenticity and exquisite taste at Asmak Tharaa Restaurant.
The restaurant offers a variety of fresh seafood dishes prepared carefully, within an elegant atmosphere and distinguished service that reflects Tharaa's identity.
Book your favorite table, and enjoy an unforgettable experience with family or friends.
special_service.terrace_session_desc:
A unique experience with a charming terrace view in an atmosphere that combines comfort and luxury.
Sessions are prepared for six people, during which everything that distinguishes Asmak Tharaa from fresh dishes and upscale service is provided.
special_service.full_terrace_desc:
For complete privacy, book the entire terrace and enjoy an exclusive atmosphere that combines luxury and privacy.
The entire place can be equipped to suit your special occasion. We provide a dedicated service staff to ensure a distinguished experience befitting the name Tharaa.
special_service.tharwa_car_desc:
If you are looking for a different experience, Tharaa Car allows you to enjoy our unique seafood wherever you are.
We come to you with our full equipment to serve fresh meals with the same quality as the restaurant inside your event or special occasion.
Ideal service for private parties, outdoor meetings, and occasions that deserve extra distinction

terrace_screen.title: Terrace Lounge
terrace_screen.subtitle: Enjoy the best times in Tharaa Lounge, comfort and distinction in an unparalleled atmosphere.
terrace_screen.terrace_description: Experience luxury in the Terrace Lounge, seating up to 6 people. Minimum order 700 SAR.
terrace_screen.full_terrace_description: Want more privacy? Book the entire terrace with a minimum spend of 2100 SAR. Luxurious and unique atmosphere.
terrace_screen.booking_note: Book your table today! Whether it's an occasion or a meal, our team is ready to make it a great experience.
terrace_screen.book_table_in_terrace_description: A unique dining experience with breathtaking terrace views, blending comfort and luxury. Each table accommodates up to six guests, featuring Asmaq Tharaa’s signature fresh seafood and premium service. Minimum order: 700 SAR.

book_table.title: Book A Table
book_table.description: Indulge in a fine dining experience that blends authenticity with refined taste at Asmaq Tharaa Restaurant. We offer a curated selection of fresh seafood dishes, meticulously prepared within an elegant atmosphere and exceptional service that reflects the Tharaa identity. Book your favorite table now and enjoy an unforgettable experience with family or friends.

support_screen.header_title: Contact us here for support request

privacy_policy_screen.main_title: 🛡️ Privacy Policy for Asmak Tharaa App
privacy_policy_screen.intro_text: At Asmak Tharaa App, we are committed to protecting our users' privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you use the app.
privacy_policy_screen.section_1_content:
We only collect information necessary to operate the app and properly provide delivery services, including:

• Personal Information: Name, email, and phone number (mandatory) when creating an account or placing an order.
• Location Information: Geographic location when using the app to determine the delivery address and view nearby branches.
• Non-personal Information: Such as device type and operating system to improve app performance.
privacy_policy_screen.section_2_header: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
privacy_policy_screen.section_2_content:
• Processing orders and delivering products to the specified address.
• Communicating with users regarding order confirmation, coordinating delivery, or resolving any issues.
• Calculating delivery time and fees, and displaying the nearest available branches.
• Improving the user experience and developing app services.

Note: The phone number is not used for marketing purposes without explicit consent.
privacy_policy_screen.section_3_header: We do not share personal information with third parties except when necessary to provide the service, such as:
privacy_policy_screen.section_3_content:
• Delivery companies to complete delivery operations.
• Payment gateways to securely process payments.

User data is not sold or rented to any third party.
privacy_policy_screen.section_4_content: We take appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect user information from unauthorized access, modification, or unlawful disclosure.
privacy_policy_screen.section_5_content: Users can request the deletion of their account and personal data from within the app. Upon account deletion, the associated data is removed in accordance with legal and operational requirements.
privacy_policy_screen.section_6_content: The Asmak Tharaa App is not directed at children under the age of 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information about them.
privacy_policy_screen.section_7_content: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and we advise users to review it periodically.
privacy_policy_screen.section_8_content:
For any inquiries related to the privacy policy, you can contact us via:
Email: info@asmaktharaa.com
